violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on all low boy units within the establishment. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2024

The right handle on the nitro cooler was observed to be missing and the bottom right drawer of the prep unit was observed to be loose and not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2024
